Descriptions.Trap: A stationary hazard that activates when a creature comes within its trigger area.

EnableOverlay.Name: Enable Alternity Overlay
EnableOverlay.Hint: Activates Alternity-style skill point, achievement, and class overlays.

HideCoreCompendiums.Name: Hide Core SFRPG Compendiums
HideCoreCompendiums.Hint: Removes Starfinder system compendiums from the Compendium directory in this world.

StartingSkillPointsBase.Name: Base Starting Skill Points
StartingSkillPointsBase.Hint: Flat number of starting Alternity skill points granted before Intelligence is applied.

IntelligenceMultiplier.Name: Intelligence Skill Point Multiplier
IntelligenceMultiplier.Hint: Multiplier applied to the actor's Intelligence score when determining starting Alternity skill points.

LevelSkillPointBase.Name: Per-Level Skill Point Base
LevelSkillPointBase.Hint: Base number of Alternity skill points granted at each level above 1.

LevelSkillPointIncrement.Name: Per-Level Skill Point Increment
LevelSkillPointIncrement.Hint: Additional scaling applied per level above 1 when calculating earned Alternity skill points.

Spells.FXBonusPrompt: Enter the manual FX power bonus.
Spells.PsionicBonusPrompt: Enter the manual psionic power bonus.
Spells.PowerCastInfo: Casting consumes power equal to the selected spell level.
Spells.WarningInsufficientPower: Current {poolLabel} is too low to cast any available spell level.
Spells.UntypedHidden: {count} untyped spell items are hidden from Alternity tabs.
Spells.InvalidHidden: {count} spell items are flagged as both FX and Psionic and are hidden.
Spells.EmptyFX: No FX spells are assigned to this character.
Spells.EmptyPsionics: No psionic spells are assigned to this character.

FXFactor.Label: FX Power Factor
FXFactor.Hint: Multiplies Intelligence when calculating the actor's FX power pool.

PsionicFactor.Label: Psionic Power Factor
PsionicFactor.Hint: Multiplies Will when calculating the actor's psionic power pool. Each Mindwalker starts with psionic energy points equal to his or her Will score. A talent or a Diplomat with the Mindwalker secondary profession has psionic energy points equal to one-half his or her Will score (rounded up). Psionic Energy Points: Talent .5×Will, Diplomat(Mindwalker) .5x Will, Mindwalker 1×Will, Fraal 1.5×Will

FXCost.Label: FX Talent Skill Point Cost
FXCost.Hint: Default base skill point cost for FX spell talents on actors using this archetype.

PsionicCost.Label: Psionic Talent Skill Point Cost
PsionicCost.Hint: Default base skill point cost for psionic talents on actors using this archetype.

MaxSkillPointsAdjustment.Label: Maximum Skill Point Adjustment
MaxSkillPointsAdjustment.Hint: Adds or removes available Alternity skill points for characters of this species.
